commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Gateway display projection for `sessions_yield` tool results, updates `chat.message.get` and session-history SSE handling, and adds Gateway/agent regression tests for replaying yielded wait text.

PR surface: Source +447, Tests +856. Total +1303 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main projects chat history without a `sessions_yield` mirror while default WebChat hides `toolResult` rows when `showToolCalls=false`. I did not run the UI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should choose the canonical visible-tool history contract across this PR and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87471 before repair or merge.

target.title: Replay sessions_yield wait text in WebChat history
target.body:
Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/87321

## User-facing bug

WebChat replay could drop a visible `sessions_yield` wait message when that wait text was stored as a transcript tool result instead of a normal assistant text row. In practice, reopening a session could hide text such as "Waiting for child completion.", or expose a raw `toolResult` shape when `chat.message.get` asked for the stored row directly.

## Exact repro

1. Create or load a transcript with an assistant `sessions_yield` tool call.
2. Store the corresponding tool result with `{ "status": "yielded", "message": "Waiting for child completion." }`.
3. Reopen the session through `chat.history` / WebChat replay, or fetch the transcript row through `chat.message.get`.
4. Before this patch, the user-visible wait text could be absent, duplicated in incremental replay, or returned as a raw hidden tool-result row.
5. After this patch, replay projects the yielded wait text as assistant text, hides duplicate/raw yield-only rows, and keeps ordinary tool results visible through the existing indexed path.

## Fix summary

- Added `sessions_yield` display projection in `src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts`.
- Tracks pending `sessions_yield` calls by `toolCall`, `tool_use`, and OpenAI `function_call` / `call_id` shapes.
- Mirrors successful yielded tool results into assistant-shaped text marked with `openclawSessionsYieldMirror`.
- Keeps hidden `sessions_yield` call rows as raw SSE context so later inline tool results can still be projected correctly.
- Prevents orphan, duplicate, and explicit non-yield tool results from being converted into assistant text.
- Makes `chat.message.get` expand visible `sessions_yield` mirrors from full transcript context, while returning `not_visible` for hidden duplicate yield rows.
- Aligns subagent announce summaries with projected yield mirrors.

## Targeted tests

- Added session-history coverage for basic yield projection, separated assistant text, OpenAI `function_call` / `call_id`, missing result call id, unnamed yielded result with one pending call, orphan results, completed pending context, explicit non-yield tool results, inline SSE dedupe, interleaved tool results, and hidden-call inline context.
- Added gateway `chat.message.get` coverage for full-history expansion, hidden duplicate yield rows, and ordinary tool-result indexing.
- Added subagent announce coverage for projected `sessions_yield` mirror semantics.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: WebChat replay now shows transcript-backed `sessions_yield` wait text as normal assistant text without fabricating assistant output from unrelated tool results or exposing hidden duplicate yield rows.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on branch `fix/webchat-replay-sessions-yield`, commit `28bd7c8668`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/agents/subagent-yield-output.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-output.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-output.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx -e "<unnamed yielded sessions_yield projection proof>"`
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `OPENCLAW_HEAVY_CHECK_LOCK_SCOPE=worktree node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-output.test.ts`
- `codex review --base origin/main`

Evidence after fix:

- `git diff --check` passed.
- Changed-file `oxlint` passed.
- Core test `tsgo` passed.
- Focused Vitest passed:
  - Gateway shard: 3 files, 91 tests passed.
  - Agents shard: 1 file, 19 tests passed.
  - 2 shards completed in 28.43s.
- Direct projection proof passed for an unnamed yielded result with one pending `sessions_yield` call:

```json
[
  {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": [{ "type": "text", "text": "Wait" }],
    "openclawSessionsYieldMirror": {
      "toolName": "sessions_yield",
      "toolCallId": "call-yield"
    }
  }
]
```

- The targeted tests cover:
  - `function_call` / `call_id` projection.
  - explicit `sessions_yield` results that omit result call ids.
  - unnamed yielded results when one `sessions_yield` call is pending.
  - orphan tool results remaining raw.
  - explicit non-yield yielded tool results remaining raw.
  - interleaved other tool results not duplicating wait rows.
  - inline hidden `sessions_yield` call context for following tool results.
  - hidden duplicate `sessions_yield` results returning `not_visible` from `chat.message.get`.
  - truncated `chat.message.get` yield mirror expansion.
  - ordinary tool results staying on the indexed single-message path.
- `codex review --base origin/main` reported no actionable correctness issues. Its own Vitest attempt was blocked by sandbox EPERM while writing Vite temp files under `node_modules`; the same focused Vitest command passed locally with worktree lock scope and the required permissions.

Observed result after fix: History snapshots include assistant-shaped yield mirrors with wait text and transcript metadata; raw successful `sessions_yield` tool results are removed from display history; bounded `chat.message.get` expands visible yield mirrors using full transcript context; hidden duplicate yield rows are not exposed as raw tool-result JSON; and ordinary tool results are still retrievable through the existing single-message path.

What was not tested: I did not run the full `pnpm check` / full test matrix locally, and I did not drive a browser WebChat replay manually. Coverage is through focused gateway/session-history/subagent tests plus direct local projection proof.

## AI-assisted disclosure

This patch was prepared with AI assistance. I used local code inspection, targeted regression tests, explicit local command output, and `codex review --base origin/main` before updating the PR.
target.author: alexzhu0
